recipe.title: Breakfast for Dinner — Omelettes, Grits & Fruit
steps: Whisk eggs, milk, salt, and pepper in a large bowl until well combined.
Melt butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Pour in egg mixture and cook gently, stirring occasionally, until eggs begin to set.
Add shredded cheese, diced ham, fresh spinach, and crumbled goat cheese to one half of the omelette. Fold the other half over the fillings.
Continue cooking 1-2 more minutes until cheese is melted and eggs are fully cooked through. Slide onto plate.
Repeat with remaining egg mixture to make 4-6 omelettes total, adding butter to the pan as needed.
Bring 6 cups water or milk to a boil in a medium saucepan. Stir in quick grits and reduce heat to low.
Cook grits according to package directions, stirring frequently, until thick and creamy — about 5-7 minutes.
Stir in 2 tablespoons butter and season with salt to taste. Keep warm.
Quarter strawberries and halve grapes. Arrange fresh fruit on a serving platter.
Serve omelettes alongside creamy grits and fresh fruit for a complete breakfast-for-dinner spread.
